g.text: One fact, one home. Always read first.
🖊️ FE Pre-Task Phase — run BEFORE writing task rows for any new FE page (skip for bug fixes and minor component changes)
Flow: READ SPEC → DRAW Wireframe → DECOMPOSE Components → WRITE TASK ROWS (spec_ref + draw_ref) → 7-STEP LOOP per task
← refer back to spec when a task is ambiguous
⚠️ Rule: No FE task row starts without spec_ref + draw_ref. Missing spec_ref → flag ❓ CLARIFY (spec section missing). Missing draw_ref → run 0b DRAW first.
